A

addToy() - Method in class mru.store.controller.StoreManager
This methods adds a new toy based on user input.

Animals - Class in mru.store.model
This class represents the toy type animals and extends from the general toy class.
Animals(String, String, String, double, int, int, String, String) - Constructor for class mru.store.model.Animals
This method initializes the general attributes of the toy class plus the specific attributes for animals.
